description:
A Security Manager is setting up a surveillance operations center and needs to assign logical IDs to cameras. Assign the following logical IDs to the specific cameras using the Nx Witness REST API (Base URL: https://localhost:7001, Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!):

* Parking Lot Camera: 101
* Entrance Camera: 102
* Server Room Camera: 103

Authentication is performed via POST to /rest/v1/login/sessions to obtain a Bearer token. Device listings are available at GET /rest/v1/devices and updates are applied via PATCH to /rest/v1/devices/{deviceId} using the body {"logicalId": <number>}.
